title: Click and Beware
relevance_summary: Phishing scams via compromised social media accounts and influencer influence to trick users into connecting their wallets to malicious sites.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that connects a wallet to a suspicious URL or redirects to a known phishing domain.

summary: A user clicked on a phishing link from a compromised social media account, leading to the loss of $35 million worth of fwDETH. A guard could have blocked the transaction by detecting and preventing URL redirections to known phishing domains.
